Document:
# Corpsman This is where I would put the Corpsman Figurine.. IF I HAD ONE!
“A [bold][color=#004d75]Cadet[/bold][/color] has died without coordinates. Oh noooo, if only they turned on their coordinates oh noooooo”
- Expected to drop everything they’re doing the second a member of [bold][color=#004d75]Security Staff[/bold][/color] falls into critical condition. Bringing backup is advisable.
- Expected to perform [bold][color=lightblue]Brigmedic[/bold][/color] duties if there is no [bold][color=lightblue]Brigmedic[/bold][/color] on shift.
## Responsible for: - Rescuing & Stabilizing [bold][color=red]Critical[/bold][/color] [bold][color=#004d75]Security Staff[/bold][/color]. - Finding missing [bold][color=#004d75]Security Staff[/bold][/color]. - Ensuring [bold][color=#004d75]Security Staff[/bold][/color] do not fall into [bold][color=red]Critical Condition[/bold][/color] during a fight. - Monitoring Vitals.
Standard [bold][color=green]Code Green[/bold][/color] Equipment:
in
or
